# Aidoku Sources

Install the source list in Aidoku:

- `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hk-0nl/host/main/hosting/dist/aidoku/index.json`

Current packages:

- Anna's Archive v5: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hk-0nl/host/main/hosting/dist/aidoku/sources/en.annasarchive-v5.aix`
- NovelUpdates v9: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/hk-0nl/host/main/hosting/dist/aidoku/sources/en.novelupdates-v9.aix`

Anna's Archive defaults to `annas-archive.gl`. Change the source settings to use `.li`, `.org`, `.se`, or a custom reachable mirror.

NovelUpdates v9 fixes live release-row parsing for chapter number, title, date, language, and translation group; adds series-cover chapter thumbnails and proper cover request headers; and retains account-backed discovery, expanded browse tabs, Home sections, filters, author navigation, and external chapter-link handoff. It does not support account tracking or in-app translator-page extraction.
